# Math track — consolidated LaTeX bugs (generated)

> Authoritative scan via `node tools/scan-latex-bugs.js`. Two genuine classes only:
> **unclosed `$`** (odd `$` count in a field; breaks MathJax) and **lost matrix row break** (`\\`).
> `$e<0$`-style `<`/`>` in math are **not** bugs. Fix these in the mechanical LaTeX pass (master Mode 4).

**Unclosed-$ fields: 97 across 11 sections.**
**Matrix row-break issues:** see per-section plans (Part 19 has the agent-verified list).
